productDisplayName: Nike Women White & Grey Downshifter Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Enjoy your runs in style with the nike Downshifter 4 MSL running shoe. Lightweight and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and t-shirts. Product Details Mesh upper with synthetic strips on the backfoot for breathability and structural comfort Meshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for a snug Fit and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Synthetic overlays with swooshes on the sides for enhanced shoe structure Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption External heel counter to lock the foot in place Rubber shank for absolute midfoot support and torsional rigidity through midstance Forefoot flex grooves for smooth transition Heel scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protection Waffle patterned lugs in the TPR outsole with an impact guidance line and a scooped heel  Material and Care Mesh, synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
